# Mitopure SoftgelsUrolithin A

## Clinically proven benefits

results.title: Mitopure® User Guide: Elevate Your Urolithin A Experience - Timeline
results.content:
Incorporating Mitopure® into your daily life is a transformative step towards unparalleled cellular health.

Whether you choose the convenient softgels, tasty gummies, or the versatile powder, this guide will teach you everything you need to know about using Mitopure effectively, maximizing its benefits, and seamlessly integrating it into your lifestyle.

Urolithin A

## What is Mitopure?

Before we dive into the specifics, let's briefly recap what Mitopure is.

Mitopure is a highly pure form of Urolithin A, a powerful compound that has been extensively studied for its potential to support mitochondrial health, enhance muscle strength, and even slow down skin aging when applied topically. [...] man and woman with Urolithin A Softgels

## What to know

 Mitopure, a highly pure form of Urolithin A, promotes mitochondrial health, which is essential for improving energy levels, muscle strength, and endurance.
 For optimal results, users should take 500mg to 1000mg of Mitopure daily. Mitopure comes in three clinically validated forms, softgels, gummies and powder, to easily fit into your routine.
 While some users report feeling more energetic within 4-8 weeks, maximum benefits like improved muscle health may take several months, as Mitopure works at the cellular level.
 Mitopure has been extensively studied and is third-party tested, making it a reliable supplement for supporting mitochondrial and overall health. [...] ## Can I Switch Between Softgels, Gummies and Powder?

Yes, you can switch between forms. Remember, though, that two softgels and two gummies provide 500mg of Urolithin A while one stick pack of powder provides 500mg of Urolithin A.

## How to Store Mitopure

Here are some storage tips that ensure your Mitopure stays effective:

 Store the bottle in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
 Always keep the lid tightly closed when not in use.

## Safety and Precautions

Mitopure is FDA GRAS-approved. However, always consult with a healthcare professional before starting any supplement, especially if you have any pre-existing health conditions or are taking medications.

Mitopure is not recommended for use during pregnancy, breastfeeding, or in children without medical advice.

results.title: Mitopure Gummies - Timeline
results.content:
Take 2 gummies daily for the foundational daily dose, or 4 gummies daily for 1000mg Mitopure. Gummies can be taken with meals or on an empty stomach. For optimal results, use consistently for at least four months and beyond.

Yes, you can combine gummies with another form of Mitopure (2 softgels or 1 stickpack of Berry Powder) as long as you do not exceed the maximum recommended dose of 1000mg/day.

Mitopure Gummies are vegan, gluten-free and sugar-free. They are made without milk, eggs, nuts, crustaceans, shellfish, wheat, soy and sesame.

Mitopure Gummies contain no artificial sweeteners, colors or flavors. They are sweetened with Reb M, which is a natural ingredient derived from stevia.

results.title: Mitopure® technology is launching globally - Timeline
results.content:
Timeline (parent company Amazentis) is a pioneering Swiss health science company committed to revolutionizing the longevity industry with its groundbreaking, clinically proven, proprietary ingredient Mitopure®. Offering a comprehensive approach to cellular health, Timeline incorporates the benefits of Mitopure inside its next-generation nutritional supplements and topical skin health products. With more than a decade of expertise in aging science research, Timeline seeks to push the boundaries of human healthspan, contributing to a future where everyone can live longer, healthier lives. The company is backed by over 15 years of research by distinguished scientists, multiple clinical studies, and over 50 global patents. Nestlé Health Science and L’Oréal are investors in the company. [...] clinically proven longevity benefits on the skin. Each product is designed to act on the skin's visible biological age, marking Mitopure®’s first deployment at global scale through a major beauty brand. [...] Skin longevity represents a major scientific breakthrough opening a new societal paradigm. It is no longer about masking the signs of time but decoding the fundamental biological mechanisms to preserve and restore skin healthspan. This leadership carries a responsibility: to empower consumers with knowledge and to set new standards for the category through an inclusive, optimistic vision of aging.

### A Rapidly Expanding Longevity Ecosystem

The arrival of Timeline® into our Longevity Integrative Science™ ecosystem completes a progressive strategy already set in motion by Lancôme through two additional technological pillars:

Product Innovation (Absolue Longevity)
